name: PC Tycoon 2
short_description: Manage your computer company and develop your PC components, create your own laptop, monitor, develop an interactive operating system or build your PC. Research new technologies, improve your office and your factory, hire the best employees, buy other companies and build your computer empire!
detailed_description:
PC Tycoon 2 is a brand new version of PC Tycoon. In the game you have to manage your computer company and develop your PC components: processors, video cards, motherboards, RAM, disks. You can create your own laptop, monitor, or develop an operating system that you can test. You will also be able to build a PC. Research new technologies, improve your office and your factory, hire the best employees, invest in marketing, or save money and buy one of the computer giants!

PC Tycoon 2 gives you almost complete freedom of action. Create components for your computer from scratch by selecting the desired characteristics and design. The game has detailed statistics of your company and products, intelligent algorithms for evaluating products and behavior of companies, a computer simulator, interactive operating systems created by the player that you can test.

Also in the game there are:
* 3000+ technologies for research
* Challenging mode for fans of economic strategies
* Smart behavior of competitors, automatic development and release of products
* The ability to run the OS on your gaming PC
* 10 levels of office improvement with beautiful 3D models
* Many ways to invest your money, including buying companies, marketing, paid employee search

supported_languages: English, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Traditional Chinese, Polish, Portuguese - Portugal, Russian, Turkish, Ukrainian, Hindi
